title: LoopRequestPayload
description: Alpha's request to run a bounded, self-correcting loop toward a spec. Looping methodology (Ralph / loop engineering): fresh context each iteration, verifiable stop condition, external state.

spec.description: The durable specification the loop works toward (the external source of truth).

stop_condition.description: An EXTERNALLY verifiable done-check (e.g. 'all tests pass', 'build green'). Must be checkable by the Verifier, never self-reported by the worker.

no_progress_patience.description: Iterations with no measurable progress before the loop stops.
